user.title: NeoHub Control
user.description: NeoHub Control runs as a Home Assistant add-on. HACS can install this companion helper, but HACS cannot run or update add-on containers. To install the working bridge, add `{repository_url}` in Settings > Add-ons > Add-on Store > Repositories, or open `{addon_store_url}`. Submit to create a helper entry that keeps these instructions in Home Assistant.

abort.already_configured: NeoHub Control helper is already configured.
